proved: Draft 2020-12 manifest, proposal, and certification schemas are executable
lexical traversal, absolute paths, and resolved package escape fail closed
expected-valid and expected-invalid proposal fixtures are both required
valid proposal plugin identity must match the manifest
undeclared capabilities, hostnames, wildcard apexes, and URL-shaped network targets are denied
documentation, license, and runtime marker are package-contained and present
the report distinguishes contract certification from runtime safety
notProved: valid WebAssembly component format or WIT compatibility
native MCP sandboxing (which is not promised)
runtime timeout, cancellation, crash, output flood, or secret leakage
install, upgrade, downgrade, disable, removal, signature, or archive extraction
